text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day before the Arima Kinen, and Tamamo
Cross casually inspects the track before the big
race. Surprisingly, she's not the slightest bit
anxious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt about it—she's matured. I'm
certain Tamamo Cross will overwhelm her rivals
with her perfected form and spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this run set to be her last, Tamamo Cross is
eager to shock the world during this final
opportunity to unleash her lightning.
